doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_nexttoinf (mpfr/src/next.c L87-L117). Compute the immediate-neighbor representable value of x in the direction of +/-infinity (preserving sign), at x's own precision. No rounding occurs, so the TS port returns a bare MPFR rather than a Result {value, ternary}.

C behaviour (mpfr/src/next.c L87-L117):
  - Singular branch:
      * Zero -> mpfr_setmin(x, __gmpfr_emin): smallest representable at
          emin, SIGN PRESERVED. (Unlike mpfr_nexttozero, no sign flip.)
          Mantissa = 2^(prec-1), exp = emin.
      * Inf -> no-op (already at the destination). x stays +/-Inf.
      * NaN -> the C function does NOT assert on NaN; the singular branch
          falls through silently and x remains NaN. The TS port likewise
          propagates NaN -> NaN.
  - Normal branch (mpfr/src/next.c L96-L116):
      * Add one ULP to the mantissa: mant += 1.
      * If mant becomes 2^prec (overflow past the prec-bit window, i.e.
          the value 1.0000...E[exp+1] in binary; the C detects this via
          carry-out from mpn_add_1):
          - If exp == emax (= 2^30 - 1): set to +/-Inf (same sign).
          - Else: exp += 1, mant = 2^(prec-1) (just the MSB set).
      * Otherwise (no carry): mant += 1 is the result.

Ternary semantics: not applicable -- mpfr_nexttoinf is exact in the
precision-defined lattice. The TS port returns MPFR, not Result.

emin/emax: we use EMIN_DEFAULT = -(2^30 - 1) and EMAX_DEFAULT = 2^30 - 1
(mpfr/src/mpfr.h L231-L232), matching set_exp.ts and the golden driver
(which never calls mpfr_set_emin/emax).
divergence_from_c:
1. Return shape: C mutates x in place; TS returns a fresh MPFR.
2. emin/emax: C uses thread-local __gmpfr_emin / __gmpfr_emax (default +/-(2^30-1)); the TS port uses the same defaults as compile-time constants. Calls to mpfr_set_emin/set_emax are not supported by the TS port.
3. NaN handling matches the C behaviour (no-op on NaN, returning NaN unchanged), so there is no divergence on that case.
refs: src/ops/set_exp.ts -- sister port using the same EMIN/EMAX_DEFAULT.
mpfr/tests/tnext.c -- mined test cases (indirectly via nextabove/nextbelow which delegate here).
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts' -- NaN propagation, signed zero observable.
